sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84182" key="podoyo/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποδο-ψόφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84182.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making a noise with the foot</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feet,</tr_> ib.</sense> </entryFree>
